title: Melody Maison Red Bow Detail PVC Backed Coir Doormat 60cm x 40cm
features: This Red Bow Detail PVC Backed Coir Doormat 60cm x 40cm is the perfect way to dress up the entrance to your home. A great way to welcome family and friends to your home during the festive season.

This Red Bow Detail coir mat is suitable for any entrance doorway or porch, the coir offers a great scraping quality, perfect for muddy shoes, absorbing water well - meaning your floors stay cleaner for longer!
Also available in more colours and designs to suit any home decor, including more Christmas themed designs!
60cm x 2cm x 40cm (width x height x depth)
